sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34475" key="e)mpo/lisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμπόλ-ῐσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n34475.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fixing of the pole</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
